title: Reconceptualizing Parent‐Adolescent Relationships: A Dialogic Model
abstract: The author applies a dialogic view of communication to parent‐adolescent relationships, allowing for explicit attention to the process of interaction and social construction of meaning within these relationships. The constitutive role of dialogue between parent and adolescent is set within the context of competing tensions or dialectics. This theoretical framework provides a perspective for attending to parents' and adolescents' experiences and relational interactions, as well as meaning making and identity formation occurring within the dialogic gap.
